text.title: Multi-Agent Spec — Content Pipeline Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: research → write → edit content pipeline with budgets, model assignment, and termination predicate.

section.title: Brief
section.p: Internal need: produce a 1500-word explainer on EU AI Act Articles 5/6/9 relevant to a product team. Budget: 25k tokens, 6 minutes. One developer can ship the result; quality bar is "publishable on engineering blog with editor sign-off".

section.title: STEP 1 — Roster
section.code: - name: researcher | role: "Gather + summarise EU AI Act Articles 5/6/9 relevant to recommendation systems" - name: writer | role: "Compose the 1500-word explainer from researcher findings; no new claims" - name: editor | role: "Tighten clarity, fix factual drift against findings, finalize markdown"
section.p: Pairwise overlap check: researcher×writer share 1 noun ("findings/explainer"), writer×editor share 1 ("explainer/markdown") — passes ≤2 threshold.

section.title: STEP 2 — Pattern
section.p: Dependency: editor needs writer output; writer needs researcher output. Linear DAG → `sequential`.

section.title: STEP 3-5 — Full spec
section.code: task: "Produce a 1500-word internal explainer on EU AI Act Articles 5/6/9 for recommendation-system engineers" pattern: sequential decision_authority: orchestrator message_schema: schema_version: v1 fields: [schema_version, from, to, payload, ts] budget: {total_tokens: 25000, wallclock_s: 360} termination: kind: predicate predicate: "result.final_markdown != null AND result.word_count >= 1400 AND result.word_count <= 1700" agents: - name: researcher role: "Gather and summarise EU AI Act Articles 5/6/9 relevant to recommendation systems" model: sonnet system_prompt: | You are a research specialist on EU regulation. Output strict JSON. Forbidden: opinion, generalities, claims without article reference. Schema: {findings:[{claim, article, source_url}], confidence: 0..1} token_budget: 6000 timeout_s: 90 - name: writer role: "Compose the 1500-word explainer from researcher findings; introduce no new claims" model: sonnet system_prompt: | You are a technical writer for engineering blogs. Output JSON. Forbidden: any claim not present in researcher.findings[]. Schema: {draft_markdown: str, word_count: int, claims_used: [{idx, source_url}]} token_budget: 8000 timeout_s: 120 - name: editor role: "Tighten clarity, fix factual drift vs researcher.findings, finalize markdown" model: opus system_prompt: | You are a senior editor. Compare draft_markdown to researcher.findings — fail any claim with no source. Schema: {final_markdown: str, change_log: [str], word_count: int} token_budget: 5000 timeout_s: 90

section.title: STEP 6 — Validation
section.code: $ python scripts/validate-multi-agent-basics.py spec.yaml spec.yaml: ok (3 agents, sequential, sum_budget=19000 ≤ 0.9*25000)
